title: Scenes
description: Typed scene-by-scene structure used as input to build_creative for generative video platforms. Renamed from 'storyboard' to avoid collision with the testing-harness storyboard concept used elsewhere in AdCP.

scenes.description: Ordered list of scenes that compose the generated video. Sum of `duration_ms` across scenes should match the target video duration.

order.description: 1-indexed sequence position of this scene in the final video.

duration_ms.description: Duration of this scene in milliseconds.

description.description: Visual description of the scene for synthesis (what should appear, action, mood, framing).

caption.description: On-screen caption text for this scene (optional).

scenes.description: Open on a sunset beach with the brand logo overlay
scenes.caption: Summer Sale Now

scenes.description: Product close-up — limited-edition sneakers, slow zoom
scenes.caption: Up to 50% Off

scenes.description: Logo end-card with CTA button overlay
scenes.caption: Shop Now
